title: Backend engineer focused on stable delivery, integration, and real business workflows
summary: Backend engineer with {years} of experience building internal business systems, workflow-driven platforms, and integration services. Core strengths include PHP/Laravel development, API integration, database-centric applications, and translating business requirements into reliable operational flows. I focus on maintainability, delivery stability, and practical problem solving. Outside of work, I build automation and AI-assisted labs to deepen system design and backend architecture skills.
